The food in the canteen is very good.

review_content.Placements: Almost 10% of the students got placed because companies were not hiring every year students. Almost 50% of the students got internships in government hospitals for experience and medical knowledge. Pharmacist roles are offered in the hospital.

reviews_list.review_title: I would like to say that this college has a very vast campus good teachers I started here in 2021.

review_content.Placements: Placement is not so good here. If I say about placement then only one time in my 3.5 year of college experience I had seen placement job fair. But yes good companies approach here for hiring students. Appx 10 percent student has been placed. The highest package was offered 1 lack per month and the lowest was 3.5 lack per year.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure is better having a very large campus. And best part about the college is that it has a very big playground. There is one separate department for pharmacy course. Hostel is also pretty good. It has 2 type of hostel provided.

reviews_list.review_title: I am dissatisfied because of the poor placements as well as faculty members.

review_content.Placements: In placement, only 5 students got placed from my college. 3 companies visited our college. Some students got selected at a low package of rupees 20000.
review_content.Infrastructure: The campus is big but not maintained. Wi-Fi is available but doesn’t work properly. Hostels are not maintained. Yes, I have faced infrastructure related issues like outdated building. In hostel, food quality is low.
review_content.Faculty: Faculty members are not helpful and qualified. Teaching quality is bad. We didn’t get any industry exposure. Faculty is not good and some of them are even studying M.Pharma. They are not experienced.

review_content.Placements: After NEET, B.Pharma is the 2nd most preferable choice for Medical students. review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of our college is not so great though, but it's quite manageable and well maintained. Labs are well-equipped. review_summary.college_name: The Pharmaceutical College Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.title: Overall, the college provides a satisfactory environment for the students to learn.

content.Placements: In this course, a minimum of 80 to 90 percent of students are placed under our course. The package for the course is also cost-efficient and affordable. From our college, 70-80 percent of students are selected during placements and internships. Our course offers roles in like pharmacists, entrepreneurs, teaching sectors, research sectors and others.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is spectacular & present in a peaceful environment. In our college, different laboratories are provided for performing different experiments, a library is also present in which all the course-related books are available, and apart from that, some other books are available, classrooms are equipped with ACs. Good hostels with proper hygiene are provided. For the physical fitness of students, different sports events are also conducted along with all co-curricular activities.

individual_reviews.title: It is one of the best colleges in Western Odisha.

content.Placements: 90% of students get placed in our course. The highest package in our course ranges from 1-5 LPA. The top recruiting companies for our course are Mankind, Truemeds, and PharmEasy. 80% of students got internships in PharmEasy, Truemeds, and Mankind. The top roles offered are lab technician, lab assistant, drug inspector, hospital pharmacist, and railway pharmacist.
content.Infrastructure: The college has facilities and infrastructure available for our course like Wi-Fi is available all the time and classrooms have a projector facility and air-conditioned inside the classroom. The library has all types of books with operation facilities by faculty members. Facilities in our hostel are above average and food available in the canteen is good and healthy. Medical facilities provided by the college are absolutely affordable and filled with operation. The college provides sports and games and annually sports are held every year.

individual_reviews.title: My college is the best. The college provides all facilities according to students.

content.Placements: 75-80% of students study in our college in the diploma course. The highest salary offered is 1.4 lakhs per month. The lowest salary is Rs. 80,000 per month and the average salary is Rs. 40,000 per month. 80% of students get internships in companies. I suggest students join this course.
content.Infrastructure: The college provides labs, 35 classrooms, and 2 libraries. Hostels provide food accordingly day by day and overall 7 days the food is provided. In the college, the canteen is present. We get fast food and some healthy food. If there is an emergency condition, then the college provides medical facilities and treatment. On the back side of the college, some sports places and game zones are available.

individual_reviews.title: I'm dissatisfied with my college experience. I’ll not recommend you to take admission here.

content.Placements: The placement provided by our college is not very good. A minimum of about 30-40 percent of students are only able to get placements. There are not many big companies coming to our college, only local companies are coming. There is no internship available here; the students need to find their own way.
content.Infrastructure: There are not many facilities present, only the basic things are available. The hostel quality here is not very good, and the hostel food is not hygienic. The college provides a canteen, and medical facilities are available. However, not a single ground is present.

individual_reviews.title: It is a good college to take admission.

content.Placements: Our course provides many opportunities in the paramedical field. This institute provides placements every year. Industry placements are provided in our college every year.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has modern classrooms and a good management team. Free Wi-Fi is provided in the library. The library consists of books. Buses are available for the transportation of students from the hostel to the college.
content.Faculty: Teachers give their best to teach students. Our college conducts 3 internal exams and an annual exam. All the teachers are well-qualified and supportive to students. Exams are easy because of the best teaching. There are separate teachers in every department.

content.Infrastructure: Facilities in our department were quite good. We were provided with Wi-Fi for internet services. The equipment in the labs works very well. Classrooms were clean, and every class was spacious. Projectors were available in every class. The library was very large and contained more than 2 Lakhs of books. Medical and sports facilities were very good. Hostels were old and the infrastructure was not good for 2nd year students, but good for the rest. Mess food can be rated 2 of 5. This was the only problem I observed in this college.

individual_reviews.title: Affordable fees, good placements and supportive faculty.

content.Placements: Talla Padmavathi College of Pharmacy has an average placement rate of about 75 percent with packages typically ranging between 3.15 LPA and 5-6 LPA. Top recruiters include pharmaceutical firms like Care Pharmaceutics and similar organizations. Around 70 percent of students secure internships, often with companies linked to the healthcare and pharmaceutical sectors. Common roles offered include quality analyst, production associate and pharmacovigilance officer.
content.Infrastructure: Talla Padmavathi College of Pharmacy has well-equipped labs, spacious classrooms, a Wi-Fi-enabled campus and a library with a good collection. Hostel facilities are decent with clean rooms and medical support available. The mess and canteen serve hygienic food with a variety of options. Sports facilities are basic but functional supporting games like cricket and volleyball.

individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with TPCP because of its good infrastructure, eminent faculty and 90% placements.

content.Placements: Around 90% of the students got placed in reputed pharmaceutical companies. The packages offered by companies range from 4.5 to 10 LPA. Top roles offered in our course are clinical pharmacist, clinical research associate, clinical data management and pharma co-vigilance officer.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has good infrastructure and a sophisticated laboratory with advanced technology equipment. Our college management takes feedback from students regarding our necessities. Our college has a girls' hostel with high security, and delicious food is available in the mess and canteen.

individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied with all kinds of facilities and teachers.

content.Placements: I am in B.Pharma course. The placements were not provided for the B.Pharma students because it was a study purpose course, also it was not so popular. But now after 5 years of doing my bachelors degree I am working with Tamil Nadu Government hospital and earning almost 7 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: Our college provided facilities like labs, classrooms, and libraries. It had a good and well-maintained environment. There were no games or other curriculum activities. Computers and Wi-Fi were available for study-related work in the library. The canteen food was good in taste, and also the hygiene was maintained.

individual_reviews.title: It provided fantastic teachers in 2019.

content.Placements: If I talk about placements, most of the colleges in India do not provide any placements for B.Pharma students. Moreover, some students have received some good packages like 2 LPA. The top roles, like medical representatives and promoting pharmaceutical products, are offered here.
content.Infrastructure: The college provides good infrastructure along with Wi-Fi, labs, and big classrooms with good ventilation. It has a good college environment. Additionally, the canteen and mess provide good food. Classrooms have a compatible and pleasant environment. No other games or extracurricular activities are held. There is a big hall for badminton.
